summary.en: Former FOXHOUND commander recalled to direct the Shadow Moses infiltration and maintain the mission chain of command.
summary.fr: Ancien commandant de FOXHOUND rappelé pour diriger l’infiltration de Shadow Moses et maintenir la chaîne de commandement.

biography.en: Campbell serves as Snake’s principal command contact. His support covers objectives, hostages, FOXHOUND, security levels and the political constraints surrounding the operation.
biography.fr: Campbell est le principal contact de commandement de Snake. Son soutien couvre les objectifs, les otages, FOXHOUND, les niveaux de sécurité et les contraintes politiques de l’opération.

relations.label: Field operative
relations.detail: Commands Snake during the Shadow Moses incident.

relations.label: Family connection
relations.detail: Personal concern influences several mission decisions.

relations.label: Support team
relations.detail: Shares the primary support line in this simulator.

loreNotes: Shares 140.85 with Naomi; routing depends on selected subject and story context.

summary.en: Communications specialist responsible for Codec support, mission data and morale through proverbs.
summary.fr: Spécialiste des communications responsable du Codec, des données de mission et du moral grâce à ses proverbes.

biography.en: Mei Ling designed the soliton radar and handles mission-data recording. Repeated calls can provide different proverbs and comments on the operator’s current performance.
biography.fr: Mei Ling a conçu le radar soliton et gère l’enregistrement des données de mission. Les appels répétés peuvent fournir différents proverbes et commentaires sur les performances actuelles.

relations.label: Mission support
relations.detail: Records Snake’s operation data.

relations.label: Command staff
relations.detail: Works within Campbell’s support team.

loreNotes: Simulation proverbs are original and not verbatim game transcripts.

summary.en: Medical officer monitoring Snake’s condition, nanomachines and genetic mission risks.
summary.fr: Médecin surveillant l’état de Snake, ses nanomachines et les risques génétiques de la mission.

biography.en: Naomi advises on injuries, medicine, genetics and biological threats. Her personal history and the FOXDIE operation create progressively restricted or altered story states.
biography.fr: Naomi conseille sur les blessures, les médicaments, la génétique et les menaces biologiques. Son histoire personnelle et l’opération FOXDIE créent des états narratifs progressivement restreints ou modifiés.

relations.label: Family bond
relations.detail: Her history with Gray Fox is central to her motivation.

relations.label: Medical subject
relations.detail: Monitors Snake through nanomachines.

relations.label: Support team
relations.detail: Shares 140.85 with Campbell in the simulator router.

loreNotes: Late-story access can be restricted by context flags.

summary.en: REX engineer who becomes Snake’s technical contact after their meeting inside the facility.
summary.fr: Ingénieur de REX qui devient le contact technique de Snake après leur rencontre dans l’installation.

biography.en: Otacon provides information about electronic security, nuclear disposal architecture, REX and local routes. He is unavailable before Snake meets him.
biography.fr: Otacon fournit des informations sur la sécurité électronique, l’architecture du stockage nucléaire, REX et les itinéraires locaux. Il est indisponible avant sa rencontre avec Snake.

relations.label: Field ally
relations.detail: Supports Snake after their confrontation with the Ninja.

relations.label: Personal attachment
relations.detail: His feelings influence his reactions during the operation.

relations.label: Family
relations.detail: Sister, relevant to later chronology.

loreNotes: Manual recall requires meeting Otacon or restoring him from memory.

summary.en: Remote weapons analyst offering technical and historical information about equipment and nuclear systems.
summary.fr: Analyste d’armement à distance fournissant des informations techniques et historiques sur l’équipement et les systèmes nucléaires.

biography.en: Nastasha covers firearms, explosives, launchers, mines, electronic countermeasures and nuclear policy. Her subject tree is designed to expand with every item discovered.
biography.fr: Nastasha couvre les armes à feu, explosifs, lanceurs, mines, contre-mesures électroniques et la politique nucléaire. Son arbre de sujets s’étend avec chaque objet découvert.

relations.label: Weapons support
relations.detail: Provides remote equipment analysis.

loreNotes: All equipment dialogue in this project is original lore-grounded simulation text.

summary.en: A survival adviser whose channel is later revealed to have been compromised by Liquid Snake.
summary.fr: Conseiller de survie dont le canal est ensuite révélé comme ayant été compromis par Liquid Snake.

biography.en: Before the reveal, the channel presents survival, stealth and environmental advice under Miller’s identity. After the reveal, the dossier preserves the call history but marks the operator identity as Liquid Snake.
biography.fr: Avant la révélation, le canal présente des conseils de survie, furtivité et environnement sous l’identité de Miller. Après la révélation, le dossier conserve l’historique mais identifie l’opérateur comme Liquid Snake.

relations.label: Manipulated target
relations.detail: Uses trusted support access to influence Snake.

relations.label: True operator
relations.detail: Identity revealed in the late operation.

loreNotes: The actual Miller is not the operator during the incident.

summary.en: Rookie soldier and local field contact whose availability changes with her location and condition.
summary.fr: Jeune soldate et contact de terrain local dont la disponibilité change selon sa position et son état.

biography.en: Meryl provides local information and personal mission updates after Snake identifies her. Her line can become unavailable during capture, injury or separation sequences.
biography.fr: Meryl fournit des informations locales et des mises à jour personnelles après que Snake l’a identifiée. Sa ligne peut devenir indisponible pendant les séquences de capture, blessure ou séparation.

relations.label: Family connection
relations.detail: Campbell has a personal stake in her survival.

relations.label: Field partner
relations.detail: Coordinates with Snake inside Shadow Moses.

summary.en: Anonymous warning source later associated with Gray Fox, used primarily for incoming hints and scripted interventions.
summary.fr: Source anonyme d’avertissements ensuite associée à Gray Fox, principalement utilisée pour des indices entrants et interventions scriptées.

biography.en: The channel begins as an unknown signal. It should not behave like a normal support contact until the player has received and logged its transmissions.
biography.fr: Le canal commence comme un signal inconnu. Il ne doit pas se comporter comme un contact de soutien normal avant que le joueur ait reçu et consigné ses transmissions.

relations.label: Former comrade
relations.detail: Their shared history is initially concealed.

relations.label: Family bond
relations.detail: Connection becomes relevant to Naomi’s dossier.

loreNotes: Incoming-only until memory or narrative flags permit recall.

summary.en: The Secretary of Defense enters the Codec chain during the final command crisis.
summary.fr: Le secretaire a la Defense intervient sur le Codec pendant la crise finale du commandement.

biography.en: Houseman's transmissions represent political command intervention and the threat of an air strike over Shadow Moses. His route is incoming-only and has no claimed canon numeric frequency.
biography.fr: Les transmissions de Houseman representent l'intervention politique du commandement et la menace d'une frappe aerienne sur Shadow Moses. Sa route est uniquement entrante et ne revendique aucune frequence numerique canonique.

relations.label: Command override
relations.detail: Supersedes the field command chain during the final crisis.

relations.label: Field operative
relations.detail: Addresses Snake through a contextual incoming transmission.

loreNotes: The 199.01 simulator route is deliberately non-canonical.

summary.en: FOXHOUND sniper whose contextual transmissions frame the prison threat and snowfield duel.
summary.fr: Tireuse d'elite de FOXHOUND dont les transmissions contextuelles encadrent la menace en prison et le duel dans le champ de neige.

biography.en: Wolf is not a support contact. Her Codec presence is limited to incoming enemy transmissions tied to scripted encounters, with no claimed canon numeric frequency.
biography.fr: Wolf n'est pas un contact de soutien. Sa presence Codec se limite aux transmissions ennemies entrantes liees aux rencontres scenarisees, sans frequence numerique canonique revendiquee.

relations.label: Enemy target
relations.detail: Challenges Snake across prepared long-range firing lanes.

relations.label: Personal attachment
relations.detail: Otacon's feelings shape his reaction to her fate.

loreNotes: The 199.02 simulator route is deliberately non-canonical.
